hero.headline: AI-Powered Learning That Adapts to Every Student
hero.subheadline: No Learner Left Behind. Personalized education powered by Brain Clone AI technology that creates a unique learning profile for every student.
hero.slide2Subheadline: Our AI adapts in real time, identifying strengths and gaps to create a custom curriculum that keeps students engaged and on track.
hero.slide3Headline: Built for IEP Students — Loved by All
hero.slide3Subheadline: Whether your child has an IEP, a 504 plan, or just needs extra support, Aivo’s Brain Clone AI builds a learning experience as unique as they are.
hero.slide4Headline: 5 Expert AI Tutors, One Personalized Journey
hero.slide4Subheadline: From math to reading comprehension, our specialized AI tutors meet students where they are and guide them forward — with patience, encouragement, and adaptive intelligence.
hero.slide5Subheadline: A beautiful learner dashboard gives students, parents, and teachers instant visibility into progress, streaks, and AI-powered recommendations.
